creator: recordguy96@aol.com
text:
Needs to be updated to 0.23.1. Please update. Current version in the FreeBSD repo is from March of 2021 and results in an error in console/terminal output in regards to running the command with a valid and working configuration file (configuration file format error). Running this same program on Linux with the latest version, this file (and program) works as intended.


This is the error message that I'm getting:
"lsd: Configuration file /home/jeremy/.config/lsd/config.yaml format error, unknown field `permission`, expected one of `classic`, `blocks`, `color`, `date`, `dereference`, `display`, `icons`, `ignore-globs`, `indicators`, `layout`, `recursion`, `size`, `sorting`, `no-symlink`, `total-size`, `symlink-arrow` at line 99 column 1."
